homepage.tagline.message: An AI-powered WhatsApp bot that can chat, moderate groups, and be fully customized to your liking.

homepage.cta.getStarted.description: The get started button on the homepage

homepage.cta.viewCommands.description: The view commands button on the homepage

homepage.howItWorks.title.description: The how it works section title

homepage.howItWorks.step1.desc.message: Add the bot's number to your WhatsApp group just like adding a regular member.

homepage.howItWorks.step2.desc.message: Define the bot's personality and rules with the /prompt command.

homepage.howItWorks.step3.desc.message: The bot is instantly active and can chat with all group members.

homepage.feature1.desc.message: An AI-powered bot that can chat naturally, answer questions, joke around, and help group members.

homepage.feature2.desc.message: Can automatically delete spam messages or kick troublesome members according to rules you set.

homepage.feature3.desc.message: Set the bot's personality, role, and rules with the /prompt command. Different for each group.

homepage.layout.description.message: Complete documentation for using WazzapAgents — an AI-powered WhatsApp bot
